security-log-token-leak.claim: session token written to logs leaks credentials in shared logging infrastructure

security-sql-concat-injection.claim: query string interpolated directly into sql statement causes injection vector
user id interpolated unparameterised even when numeric, breaks defence in depth

security-hardcoded-api-key.claim: live stripe key hardcoded as source constant exposes production secret to version control

concurrency-balance-race.claim: balance read then write across await without lock causes race condition
credit application is not idempotent on retry, retry duplicates credit

concurrency-cache-stampede.claim: concurrent cache misses each issue the expensive query without singleflight causing stampede on cold key
cache map has no eviction so it grows unbounded across regions over time

data-loss-drop-column-migration.claim: drop column is irreversible and data is not backed up beforehand causing data loss
column dropped in single step without ensuring no live readers during rolling deploy

data-loss-truncate-in-migration.claim: truncate destroys all audit log rows with no backup or export beforehand causing irreversible data loss
audit log rows may be inside the regulatory retention window so deletion is non compliant

api-break-removed-public-field.claim: removed public field display_name from versioned api response without deprecation window

api-break-changed-status-code.claim: endpoint status code changed from 200 with body to 204 empty breaking the documented client contract
removed deleted id field from response payload clients still depend on the id for cache invalidation

perf-n-plus-one-hot-path.claim: loop performs one customer lookup per order causing n plus one queries in hot path

observability-removed-structured-log.claim: structured checkout finalized log replaced with unstructured done string loses ops visibility

observability-dropped-correlation-id.claim: structured error log dropped request id user id and path losing correlation needed for incident triage

reliability-unbounded-retry.claim: while true retry loop has no cap and no backoff causing runaway delivery calls
no exponential backoff between retry attempts hammers downstream service

reliability-blocking-event-loop.claim: synchronous readFileSync inside async request handler blocks the event loop hurting concurrency under load
thumbnail computation on the request thread stalls other requests under load

reliability-unawaited-promise.claim: receipts persist promise is not awaited so failures swallow silently and receipt rows are lost on rejection
unawaited promise has no catch handler so rejection becomes an unhandled rejection in production

correctness-pagination-off-by-one.claim: end index adds plus one returning one extra item per page off by one bug

correctness-tax-bracket-boundary.claim: boundary income values now fall outside any bracket producing wrong tax for boundary incomes
no test asserts behaviour at bracket boundaries which is the regressing surface

correctness-timezone-naive-comparison.claim: new date uses server local timezone so cutoff differs across regions and around daylight saving boundaries
no regression test pins behaviour at the midnight boundary across timezones so future fixes lack a guard

correctness-test-removed-assertion.claim: behavioural assertions on session contents replaced with a weak truthy check so regressions slip through unnoticed
test was relaxed without fixing underlying flakiness so the regression surface remains hidden
